mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO api_logs (user_id, agent, target_id, event_type, http_method, endpoint, status_code, response_time, error_code, call_at, created_at, creator, modifier, modified_at) VALUES
(#{log.userId}, #{log.agent}, #{log.targetId}, #{log.eventType}, #{log.httpMethod}, #{log.endpoint}, #{log.statusCode}, #{log.responseTime}, #{log.errorCode}, #{log.callAt}, NOW(), 'logConsumer', 'logConsumer', NOW())
